
### addq processor timing  {.smaller}

![](/pipeline/texfig/addqTimeline.figure.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center }
 
 <!-- \lstset{
    style=small,
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{@2@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<3|handout:0>]{@3@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{@4@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<5|handout:0>]{@5@}{@},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<6|handout:0>]{@6@}{@},
} -->
 
<pre><code>// init. %r8=800, %r9=900, etc.
<span data-fragment-index="2" class="fragment custom myem-only">addq %r8, %r9</span>   // R8+R9-&gt;R9
<span data-fragment-index="3" class="fragment custom myem-only">addq %r10, %r11</span> // R10+R11-&gt;R11
<span data-fragment-index="4" class="fragment custom myem-only">addq %r12, %r13</span> // R12+R13-&gt;R13
<span data-fragment-index="5" class="fragment custom myem-only">addq %r14, %r15</span> // R14+R15-&gt;R15
<span data-fragment-index="6" class="fragment custom myem-only">addq %r9, %r8</span>   // R9+R8-&gt;R8
</code></pre>
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/addqTimeline_2.figure.svg)
